ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) enoki mushrooms (see Note), rinsed with salted water and separated into bite-size bundles
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) enoki mushrooms (see Note), rinsed with salted water and separated into bite-size bundles

ingredients.item: 3½ ounces (100 g) fresh pineapple, cut into triangular slices
ingredients.original: 3½ ounces (100 g) fresh pineapple, cut into triangular slices

ingredients.item: 1 medium plum tomato, cut into wedges
ingredients.original: 1 medium plum tomato, cut into wedges

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon tamarind paste or 1 teaspoon tamarind concentrate mixed with 2 teaspoons water
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon tamarind paste or 1 teaspoon tamarind concentrate mixed with 2 teaspoons water

ingredients.item: 7 okras, sliced crosswise on the bias
ingredients.original: 7 okras, sliced crosswise on the bias

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) dried seaweed (wakame or dulse; see Note), soaked and roughly chopped
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) dried seaweed (wakame or dulse; see Note), soaked and roughly chopped

ingredients.item: 7 ounces (200 g) silken tofu, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes
ingredients.original: 7 ounces (200 g) silken tofu, cut into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes

ingredients.item: 2 ounces (56 g) rice paddy herb, chopped
ingredients.original: 2 ounces (56 g) rice paddy herb, chopped

ingredients.item: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced, for garnish (optional)
ingredients.original: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced, for garnish (optional)

ingredients.item: 1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until fragrant (about 1 minute). Add mushrooms, pineapple, tomato, and ½ teaspoon of the salt, and stir well.
ingredients.original: 1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until fragrant (about 1 minute). Add mushrooms, pineapple, tomato, and ½ teaspoon of the salt, and stir well.

ingredients.item: 2. Add tamarind paste and the water, and bring to a boil over high heat. Add okra, stock powder, remaining ½ teaspoon of salt, seaweed, and tofu, and bring to a boil again.
ingredients.original: 2. Add tamarind paste and the water, and bring to a boil over high heat. Add okra, stock powder, remaining ½ teaspoon of salt, seaweed, and tofu, and bring to a boil again.

ingredients.item: 3. Add rice paddy herb and cilantro, and cook for 1 more minute only (overcooked seaweed tends to develop an overly fishy taste and lose its color and crunchiness). Remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 3. Add rice paddy herb and cilantro, and cook for 1 more minute only (overcooked seaweed tends to develop an overly fishy taste and lose its color and crunchiness). Remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 4. Garnish with chili slices (if using) and serve hot.
ingredients.original: 4. Garnish with chili slices (if using) and serve hot.
